title: schizonepeta botryoides
intro: Schizonepeta botryoides, also known as Ba Jiao Hua Juan or Ting Li Zi, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The medicinal properties of Schizonepeta botryoides include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Schizonepeta botryoides can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, to be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
